title: Key-Value Text Input Format
description: The 'lib/input' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains classes responsible for handling key-value pairs in plain text files. The 'KeyValueLineRecordReader.java' class implements a RecordReader for key-value pairs, parsing lines based on a specified separator. 'KeyValueTextInputFormat.java' extends 'FileInputFormat' to handle text files, determining file splittability and creating 'KeyValueLineRecordReader' instances. 'NLineInputFormat.java' is a custom input format that splits input files into splits, each containing a specified number of lines. These components collaborate to read, split, and prepare text files for MapReduce processing, employing patterns like Strategy and Factory.

TITLE: Key-Value Text Input Format

DESCRIPTION:
The 'lib/input' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains classes responsible for handling key-value pairs in plain text files. The 'KeyValueLineRecordReader.java' class implements a RecordReader for key-value pairs, parsing lines based on a specified separator. 'KeyValueTextInputFormat.java' extends 'FileInputFormat' to handle text files, determining file splittability and creating 'KeyValueLineRecordReader' instances. 'NLineInputFormat.java' is a custom input format that splits input files into splits, each containing a specified number of lines. These components collaborate to read, split, and prepare text files for MapReduce processing, employing patterns like Strategy and Factory.
